source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260123 태국 Hollywood, 23G 및 P1 등록서류 - 이창민 팀장님/260324 추가요청 2. 디텍터 doc 외/11. Safety Declaration (Rev).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Safety declaration to the Thai Food and Drug Administration for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Declares the absence of specified global safety issues for the listed medical devices during the one-year period from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026 for a Thai FDA application.
keyPoints: H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares itself as Product Owner of the listed medical devices.
The declaration states there are no safety issues globally associated with intended use in the last one year from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026.
The declaration states no reported deaths, no reported serious deterioration in health, and no open field safety corrective actions including recalls at submission.
The declaration acknowledges offences and possible suspension or cancellation under Thai medical device law and Thai FDA registration conditions.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., as the Product Owner, of the medical device(s) stated below

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: Serious deterioration in the state of health
concepts.evidence: Serious deterioration in the state of health, in relation to a person means: (a) a life-threatening illness or injury suffered by that person; (b) a permanent impairment of a bodily function of that person; (c) any permanent damage to any part of that person’s body; or (d) a condition requiring medical or surgical intervention to prevent any such permanent impairment or damage.

concepts.name: Field safety corrective action
concepts.evidence: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

concepts.name: Medical Device Act (B.E.2551)
concepts.evidence: Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562)

The declaration states no reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person.

evidence.claim: Non-compliance with Thai FDA registration conditions may result in suspension or cancellation of medical device registration.
evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.
